user_title: COO & Global Head of Change Execution, WPS

talking_points.headline: HSBC's 200-Use-Case Google Cloud AI Mandate Requires an Enterprise WPS Governance Framework Now
talking_points.why_it_matters: As Global COO, Surali must establish the governance architecture that tracks, risk-assesses, and controls 200+ AI initiatives across HSBC before regional delivery creates a governance deficit.
bullets: The HSBC-Google Cloud partnership (June 17) commits to deploying Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform across wealth management, financial crime, and RM operations globally; WPS must own the portfolio governance that approves sequencing and manages delivery risk

Each initiative must meet a US$100m+ value threshold before delivery — WPS needs a standardised value-estimation and approval framework before competing regional business cases undermine the prioritisation logic

This partnership adds 200+ potential change items on top of existing concurrent delivery (stablecoin, ASEAN DPM, UHNW Access) — WPS governance must explicitly manage the accumulated portfolio load before H2 2026 compresses timelines

source_links.title: HSBC & Google Cloud AI Partnership — HSBC
HSBC Google Cloud Multi-Year AI Deal — Fintech Global

talking_points.headline: StanChart Cuts 7,000 Back-Office Roles via AI — WPS Must Define HSBC's Efficiency Response
talking_points.why_it_matters: Standard Chartered's announcement resets the industry benchmark for AI-driven operational cost reduction, pressuring Surali to articulate HSBC WPS's own efficiency roadmap for the same cycle.
bullets: Bill Winters, CEO of Standard Chartered confirmed 7,000+ role cuts by 2030 targeting a 6-point improvement in return on tangible equity — the clearest signal yet that AI-driven operational efficiency is now a competitive baseline, not a differentiator
The cuts target back-office functions in Asia and Eastern Europe: exactly the geography and function type where WPS has the most comparable operational footprint

WPS must articulate its own AI operational efficiency trajectory — which shared-service, change-execution, and compliance functions are candidates for automation, and what is the governed timeline and accountability framework?

talking_points.headline: PwC: APAC AWM Heading for US$34.5 Trillion — Tokenised Fund Infrastructure Must Be WPS Priority
talking_points.why_it_matters: PwC's 2030 projections confirm the operational scale APAC wealth will require, and 41% annual growth in tokenised fund AuM creates an immediate WPS infrastructure planning obligation.
bullets: PwC's June 17 APAC AWM report projects AuM at US$34.5 trillion by 2030 (6.8% CAGR), with Singapore as the strategic hub and APAC HNW assets hitting US$52.4 trillion — a 50%+ increase that demands commensurate operational scaling

Tokenised fund AuM is projected to grow 41% annually from $90bn to $715bn by 2030; WPS must confirm HSBC's operations, custody, and settlement infrastructure can support this new asset class at volume before competitors build the rails first

HSBC already holds a HKD stablecoin licence and has active ASEAN DPM and UHNW Access programmes — WPS must sequence these concurrent build-outs to avoid infrastructure gaps as market volumes accelerate in H2 2026

HSBC News.title: HSBC and Google Cloud Announce Multi-Year AI Partnership Targeting 200+ Use Cases
HSBC News.summary: HSBC and Google Cloud launched a multi-year AI partnership using Gemini models to enable 200+ use cases focused on hyper-personalised wealth management advice, 2x-faster financial crime detection, and RM tools—each initiative requiring US$100m+ projected value to proceed.

HSBC News.title: Two-Thirds of HNWIs in HK and China Lack Legacy Plans, HSBC Life Survey
HSBC News.summary: HSBC Life's June 22 survey of 203 HNWIs across Hong Kong and mainland China finds two-thirds have no legacy plan, with market volatility as the primary trigger; life insurance is the top planning tool for 80-92% of respondents.

Competitor Intelligence.title: Standard Chartered Plans 7,000+ Job Cuts by 2030 as AI Automates Back-Office
Competitor Intelligence.summary: Standard Chartered announced 7,000+ job cuts (15% of corporate roles) by 2030 driven by AI automation of back-office functions in Chennai, Bengaluru, Kuala Lumpur, and Warsaw, targeting an 18% return on tangible equity.

Private Banking & Wealth.title: PwC: APAC AWM to Reach US$34.5 Trillion by 2030, Singapore Leads Tokenised Wealth
Private Banking & Wealth.summary: PwC's 2026 APAC AWM report projects AuM reaching US$34.5 trillion by 2030 at a 6.8% CAGR, with tokenised fund AuM growing 41% annually to $715 billion by 2030 and Singapore positioned as the strategic cross-border wealth hub.

AI & Technology.title: FIS and Anthropic Deploy Agentic AI Agent to Compress Banking AML Investigations Days to Minutes
AI & Technology.summary: FIS and Anthropic launched a Financial Crimes AI Agent automating AML alert and case investigations from days to minutes, with BMO and Amalgamated Bank as first users and broader H2 2026 rollout planned for credit decisioning, onboarding, and fraud prevention.
